memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t tensor, const unsigned int x, const unsigned int y, const unsigned int z)
memberdef.name: TTL_read_tensor

briefdescription.para: Read a value from a tensor.

detaileddescription.para:
tensor
A TTL_int_[type]_tensor_t describing the internal tensor.
x
The offset in the x dimension
y
The offset in the y dimension
z
The offset in the z dimension
No bounds checking is performed.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t tensor, const unsigned int x, const unsigned int y)
memberdef.name: TTL_read_tensor

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t tensor, const unsigned int x)
memberdef.name: TTL_read_tensor

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_sub_tensor_t sub_tensor, const unsigned int x, const unsigned int y, const unsigned int z)
memberdef.name: TTL_read_tensor

briefdescription.para: Read a value from a tensor.

detaileddescription.para:
tensor
A TTL_int_[type]_sub_tensor_t describing the internal tensor.
x
The offset in the x dimension
y
The offset in the y dimension
z
The offset in the z dimension
No bounds checking is performed.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_sub_tensor_t sub_tensor, const unsigned int x, const unsigned int y)
memberdef.name: TTL_read_tensor

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_sub_tensor_t sub_tensor, const unsigned int x)
memberdef.name: TTL_read_tensor

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t tensor, const TTL_TENSOR_TYPE value, const unsigned int x, const unsigned int y, const unsigned int z)
memberdef.name: TTL_write_tensor

briefdescription.para: Write a value from a tensor.

parameterdescription.para: A TTL_int_[type]_tensor_t describing the internal tensor.
The offset in the x dimension
The offset in the y dimension
The offset in the z dimension

memberdef.argsstring: (const TTL_int_TTL_TENSOR_TYPE_tensor_t tensor, const TTL_TENSOR_TYPE value, unsigned int x, const unsigned int y)

briefdescription.para: Write a value from a tensor.

parameterdescription.para: A TTL_int_[type]_tensor_t describing the internal tensor.
The offset in the x dimension
The offset in the y dimension
The offset in the z dimension
